ClaySharp
Table of Contents

Enum FloatingAttachPointType

Namespace
ClaySharp.Interop
Assembly
BlackHook.ClaySharp.dll

Defines the attachment points on an element and its target when using floating (absolute) positioning.

public enum FloatingAttachPointType : byte

Fields

CenterBottom = 5

Anchor at the bottom-center edge.

CenterCenter = 4

Anchor at the true center.

CenterTop = 3

Anchor at the top-center edge.

LeftBottom = 2

Anchor at the bottom-left corner.

LeftCenter = 1

Anchor at the middle-left edge.

LeftTop = 0

Anchor at the top-left corner.

RightBottom = 8

Anchor at the bottom-right corner.

RightCenter = 7

Anchor at the middle-right edge.

RightTop = 6

Anchor at the top-right corner.
